summary: Comprehensive contract with 30 criteria covering all major aspects of F19: The Citadel & Final Boss. Criteria are testable, specific, and well-structured with concrete thresholds. Two minor gaps noted but not blocking acceptance.
strengths: Excellent coverage of the Citadel stage structure (C-01 through C-07) — verifies loading, 4 world-themed sections, and per-section mechanics individually
Thorough final boss testing (C-08 through C-12) — covers spawning, 5-phase transitions, HUD display, vulnerability windows, and defeat/victory transition
Victory screen criteria (C-13 through C-15) properly verify the new VICTORY GameState, stats display, and animated credits
Progression gating (C-16, C-17) ensures the Citadel is only accessible after completing all 12 prior stages
Embedded regression criteria (C-25 through C-30) cover all 4 worlds plus player movement and JS error checking
regressionSprints [5, 6, 7, 8] correctly covers all world sprints
Boss HP values in regression criteria (Forest: 5/6/7, Desert: 6/8/12, Tundra: 7/25/9, Volcano: 7/7/11) verified as matching prior sprint contracts
Test steps use multiple property name variations (e.g., dust_devil || dustdevil) to be resilient to naming conventions
The Architect's maxHealth === 19 matches the product spec exactly

concerns.issue: Product spec says Tundra section includes 'ice/auto-scroll' but C-05 only tests ice physics. No criterion verifies auto-scroll in the Tundra section of the Citadel.
concerns.recommendation: Note for evaluator: if auto-scroll is absent from the Tundra section, it should not be a blocking failure since it's not in any criterion. Consider adding auto-scroll check if scope permits in future.

concerns.issue: C-14 checks that victory screen displays total time, coins, and deaths, and C-21 verifies death count tracking. However, no criterion specifically verifies that total play TIME is tracked/incremented during gameplay (only that a display variable exists).
concerns.recommendation: The evaluator should verify time tracking works as part of C-14's stats verification. Not blocking since C-14's threshold implies the stats must be present and meaningful.

concerns.issue: Product spec deliverable mentions 'Power Star cosmetic unlock check' but outOfScope lists it as 'decorative only, part of polish'. This exclusion is reasonable since it's cosmetic.
concerns.recommendation: No action needed — appropriate scoping decision.

concerns.issue: Screenshot-based verification of tile palette themes (green/brown for forest) is subjective and harder to auto-evaluate than JS property checks.
concerns.recommendation: The JS evaluate checking section themes/types is the primary verification. Screenshots serve as supplementary visual confirmation.

specRequirementsCovered: Victory screen with stats: time, deaths, coins (C-14)
Citadel locked until all worlds complete (C-16)
specRequirementsNotCovered: Auto-scroll mechanic in Tundra section of Citadel (minor)
Power Star cosmetic unlock (intentionally out of scope)
coverageAnalysis.regressionCoverage: Sprints 5-8 via regressionSprints field + embedded criteria C-25 through C-30 covering all 4 worlds, player movement, and JS error checking

testability: high — all criteria have concrete JS evaluate steps with specific numeric thresholds and property checks
